name: Whatfix Digital Adoption Platform API
what_it_does: Whatfix digital adoption platform REST API for enterprises to create and manage in-app guidance, self-help widgets, and employee onboarding workflows across web and mobile applications with AI-powered content creation and usage analytics. Enables AI agents to manage flow and step creation for guided onboarding automation, handle smart tips and beacon deployment for contextual help automation, access self-help widget and search configuration for employee support automation, retrieve usage analytics and flow completion tracking for adoption measurement automation, manage content localization and translation for global onboarding automation, handle audience segmentation and targeting rule for personalized guidance automation, access task list and checklist management for structured onboarding automation, retrieve A/B test configuration for guidance optimization automation, manage integration with Workday, Salesforce, ServiceNow, and enterprise apps for DAP deployment automation, and integrate Whatfix with HRIS, LMS, and enterprise tools for end-to-end digital adoption workflow.
use_cases: Creating employee onboarding flows from digital adoption automation agents
Deploying contextual help from self-service support agents
Measuring adoption rates from analytics automation agents
Localizing training content from global onboarding agents
not_for: Consumer product onboarding (use Appcues or Chameleon for PLG products)
Full LMS with course completion tracking (use Cornerstone or Docebo for enterprise LMS)
Simple product tooltips (use Pendo or Userflow for lightweight guidance)
best_when: An enterprise organization wanting AI agents to automate employee training flow creation, self-help widget management, adoption analytics, and multi-app DAP deployment through Whatfix's enterprise digital adoption platform.
avoid_when: WHATFIX EDITOR BROWSER EXTENSION REQUIRED FOR CONTENT CREATION: Whatfix flow creation requires Whatfix Editor browser extension to record UI interactions on target application; automated content creation via API does not replace Editor-based recording for complex guided flows; automated flow management via API handles deployment and analytics but not initial recording-based content creation. ENTERPRISE IMPLEMENTATION AND CONTENT STRATEGY: Whatfix enterprise deployment requires content strategy planning, information architecture, and implementation engagement; automated standalone Whatfix API integration without content strategy creates fragmented guidance with poor adoption outcomes. APPLICATION SELECTOR PRECISION FOR MULTI-APP DEPLOYMENT: Whatfix identifies target applications by URL patterns and CSS selectors; automated deployment to multiple similar-looking applications must configure precise application selectors; automated Whatfix deployment with loose URL patterns creates guidance appearing on wrong applications.

auth.notes: Whatfix uses API key and OAuth for integrations. REST API with JSON. San Jose, California HQ (Bangalore India R&D). Founded 2014 by Khadim Batti and Vara Kumar. Backed by SoftBank, Sequoia Capital India, Cisco ($140M+ raised). Products: Digital adoption platform, flow builder, smart tips, self-help widget, task lists, analytics. Integrations: Salesforce, Workday, ServiceNow, SAP, Oracle, Microsoft. GDPR. SOC2. Serves 700+ global enterprises. Competes with WalkMe, Appcues, and Pendo for enterprise DAP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom enterprise pricing based on MAUs and applications; typically $20K-$100K+/year
pricing.notes: San Jose CA. SoftBank/Sequoia backed. Custom enterprise pricing. Annual contract. PS engagement typical.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; content and analytics queries throttled; no webhooks for content events

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING FOR COMPLETION EVENTS: Whatfix does not provide webhooks for flow completion or user engagement events; automated adoption tracking must poll analytics API; automated real-time onboarding completion notification requires implementing polling cadence

FLOW DRAFT vs PUBLISHED STATE FOR DEPLOYMENT: Whatfix flows have draft and published states; automated content deployment must explicitly publish flows after creation or update; automated flow creation without publication creates draft content invisible to end users in target application

USER SEGMENT CONFIGURATION FOR TARGETED CONTENT: Whatfix user segments determine which users see which guidance content; automated segment configuration must match user attributes passed in Whatfix initialization; automated guidance deployment to wrong segment creates irrelevant content for users

WHATFIX JS SNIPPET INSTALLATION PREREQUISITE: Whatfix guidance requires Whatfix JavaScript snippet on target web application; automated guidance management via API cannot display content on apps without Whatfix snippet; automated prerequisite check should verify snippet installation before deploying flows

ANALYTICS AGGREGATION DELAY: Whatfix usage analytics aggregates engagement data with processing lag; automated daily adoption reporting must account for analytics freshness delay; automated same-day reporting may undercount engagement for recently completed user sessions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise DAP. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Employee training and adoption data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise DAP. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Training and adoption data.
